channel.title: Python on Patrick Weygoldt
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Patrick Weygoldt

item.title: Decoding the Symphony of Weakly Electric Fish: A Journey into Automated Chirp Detection and Deep Learning
item.description: Title: “Decoding the Symphony of Weakly Electric Fish: A Journey into Automated Chirp Detection and Deep Learning” In the past year, my journey in neuroethology has taken an exciting turn as I delved into the intricate world of the communication of weakly electric fish.

item.title: My tech stack for data science with Python in 2023
item.description: A collection of libaries and tools that I use to analyze data with Python

item.title: Extracting non-stationary frequency components with forward and backward Fourier transformation
item.description: One of the most flexible tools to de-noise signals based on spectral components
